title: test_featured_content_discovery_api
description: Verify that the homepage API returns the correct featured titles for the hero carousel, including proper rotation and accurate title details for playback options.

title: test_category_based_browsing_api
description: Test the category browsing API endpoint to ensure it returns the correct list of movies, series, and anime filtered by selected genre or category with accurate metadata.

title: test_full_text_search_with_filters_api
description: Validate the search API supports full-text queries and correctly applies filters such as genre, year, rating, and type, returning relevant and filtered results.

title: test_movies_archive_browsing_api
description: Check the movies archive API for correct pagination, sorting functionality, and accurate movie details when browsing through the movie grid.

title: test_series_archive_browsing_api
description: Ensure the series archive API returns the correct series list with latest episodes, supports browsing the series grid, and provides detailed episode listings.

title: test_video_watching_and_playback_controls_api
description: Verify the video playback API supports multiple quality streams, subtitle track selection, intro skipping, source switching, and returns correct playback URLs and metadata.

title: test_series_navigation_during_playback_api
description: Test the API endpoints that allow navigation between seasons and episodes during playback, ensuring correct episode data and seamless transitions.

title: test_proxy_api_route_api
description: Validate the /api/proxy endpoint correctly tunnels media requests through the CGI tunnel, handles caching with 60s TTL, and serves binary media such as JSON, images, videos, and subtitles.
